metric_definitions.global_new_strict: Strict successes after global sequence deduplication across completed nodes in a run.
metric_definitions.gpu_hours: Completed child job runtime in Proteina-Complexa GPU-hours. Qwen/vLLM controller time is not included in the curve axis.
metric_definitions.strict_success: iPAE < 7/31, pLDDT > 0.90, and binder backbone RMSD < 1.5 A.
metric_definitions.structure_unique_strict: Foldseek-clustered strict successes. If run-level Foldseek is not available, this field is shown as pending rather than inferred.
metric_definitions.tree_reasoning: Public MethodCard fields: operator, lane, hypothesis, trigger, falsification rule, sanitized recipe, and measured node outcome.

nodes.hypothesis: Replacing stochastic beam branching with structure-aware novelty scoring (novelty_search_beam) will penalize Foldseek-similar trajectories early, forcing failure escape into unique topological basins. This preserves the proven 4x8 exploration/exploitation ratio of child_002 while converting duplicate successes into unique hits, thereby maximizing structure_unique_success_per_gpu_hour without compromising affinity or developability.
